subcodes.first_line: The commencement of every mention and every utterance hath been, and shall ever be, the remembrance of the Desire of all worlds. From Him doth all begin, and unto Him doth all return [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آغاز هر ذکر و هر بیان ذکر مقصود عالمیان بوده و هست آغاز از او ظاهر و انجام باو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
